ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 从 @vault 和 @flash 搜索返回的最大结果数（5-25）。较高的值提供更多上下文，但可能受令牌预算限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a name for this index

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the embedding model to use
ast.target: 选择要使用的嵌入模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable Model Context Protocol integration for AI chat
ast.target: 为 AI 聊天启用模型上下文协议集成

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, MCP servers connect automatically when the app loads. When disabled, servers must be connected manually from the server selection modal.
ast.target: 启用后，MCP 服务器在应用加载时自动连接。禁用后，必须从服务器选择模态框手动连接服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, code blocks are executed automatically and errors are fixed without user interaction. When disabled, a run toggle appears on each code block — you control when to run and when to repair errors.
ast.target: 启用后，代码块会自动执行，并且无需用户交互即可修复错误。禁用后，每个代码块上会出现一个运行切换按钮——您可以控制何时运行以及何时修复错误。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay in seconds between API calls for multi-step processes (5-60 seconds). Very low values may cause rate limit errors or poor responses in manual model selection mode. Default: 25 seconds.
ast.target: 多步骤流程中 API 调用之间的延迟（秒）（5-60 秒）。在手动模型选择模式下，非常低的值可能导致速率限制错误或响应质量下降。默认：25 秒。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 选择 YouTube 视频的处理方式

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: YouTube 转录文件将保存到的默认文件夹

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 启用后，转录文件将作为文件保存在您的保险库中。禁用后，转录文件仅在内部用作上下文。

ast.source: Please enter a feed or website URL to save.
ast.target: 请输入要保存的订阅源或网站 URL。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a name for the feed.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This feed URL is already saved.
ast.target: 此订阅源 URL 已保存。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 编辑超时 - 更改已拒绝

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有活动的 Markdown 文件

ast.name: aria-label
ast.target: 全选或取消全选所有来源

ast.name: content
ast.source: You have already called some tools and received results. Please now synthesise a complete, direct answer to the original question using all the tool results above. Do not call any more tools — just write the final answer.
ast.target: 您已经调用了一些工具并收到了结果。现在请使用上述所有工具结果，综合出一个完整、直接的答案来回答原始问题。请不要再调用任何工具——只需撰写最终答案。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Please synthesise a final answer based on the tool results above.
ast.target: 请根据上述工具结果综合出最终答案。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are an expert quiz generator. Generate MCQs in the exact format specified. You MUST only use information from the provided content - do not use any external knowledge.
ast.target: 您是一位专业的测验生成器。请严格按照指定格式生成多项选择题。您必须仅使用所提供内容中的信息——不要使用任何外部知识。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are an expert flashcard creator. Generate flashcards in the exact format specified. You MUST only use information from the provided content - do not use any external knowledge.
ast.target: 您是一位专业的闪卡创建者。请严格按照指定格式生成闪卡。您必须仅使用所提供内容中的信息——不要使用任何外部知识。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are an expert educator providing clear, concise explanations based strictly on provided source material.
ast.target: 您是一位专业的教育者，基于严格提供的源材料提供清晰、简洁的解释。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Provide a brief explanation (max 2 sentences) for why the given answer is correct.
ast.target: 请为给定答案为何正确提供简要解释（最多2句话）。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are an expert at creating concept maps from educational content.
ast.target: 您是一位从教育内容创建概念图的专家。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Continue with the remaining tools and provide the final answer.
ast.target: 继续使用剩余的工具并提供最终答案。

ast.name: content
ast.source: All tools in this batch have already been executed and their results are shown above. Do not call any more tools and do not provide a final answer yet. Simply acknowledge that the results have been received.
ast.target: 此批次中的所有工具都已执行完毕，其结果如上所示。请不要再调用任何工具，也不要提供最终答案。只需确认结果已收到即可。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Web and local search using the Brave Search API.
ast.target: 使用 Brave Search API 进行网络和本地搜索。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your Brave Search API key. Get one for free at the Brave Search developer portal.
ast.target: 您的 Brave Search API 密钥。可在 Brave Search 开发者门户免费获取一个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: AI-powered web search via Perplexity Sonar API.
ast.target: 通过 Perplexity Sonar API 进行 AI 驱动的网络搜索。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your Perplexity API key. Find it in your Perplexity account settings under API.
ast.target: 您的 Perplexity API 密钥。可在您的 Perplexity 账户设置中的 API 部分找到。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neural search engine for web, code, and company research. Uses the official Exa hosted MCP — no local install needed.
ast.target: 用于网络、代码和公司研究的神经搜索引擎。使用官方 Exa 托管的 MCP——无需本地安装。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional but recommended — removes rate limits. Get a free key from the Exa dashboard. The key can be any format (no specific prefix required).
ast.target: 可选但推荐——移除速率限制。从 Exa 仪表板获取免费密钥。密钥可以是任何格式（无需特定前缀）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fetch any URL and convert it to clean Markdown. Pull web content, docs, or articles into your notes.
ast.target: 获取任何 URL 并将其转换为干净的 Markdown。将网络内容、文档或文章拉入您的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the current time in any IANA timezone and convert between timezones.
ast.target: 获取任何 IANA 时区的当前时间并在时区之间转换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Interact with GitHub repos, issues, PRs, and code search.
ast.target: 与 GitHub 仓库、问题、PR 和代码搜索进行交互。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A GitHub PAT with repo and read:org scopes. Create one in GitHub Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens.
ast.target: 一个具有 repo 和 read:org 权限的 GitHub PAT。在 GitHub 设置 → 开发者设置 → 个人访问令牌中创建一个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Persistent memory store using a local knowledge graph. No API key needed.
ast.target: 使用本地知识图谱的持久化内存存储。无需 API 密钥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Structured step-by-step reasoning tool. No API key needed.
ast.target: 结构化的逐步推理工具。无需 API 密钥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Control a real browser — navigate pages, click, fill forms, take screenshots.
ast.target: 控制真实浏览器——导航页面、点击、填写表单、截图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Headless Chrome automation for web scraping and screenshots.
ast.target: 用于网页抓取和截图的无头 Chrome 自动化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read history, diffs, commits, branches, and blame from any local Git repository.
ast.target: 从任何本地 Git 仓库读取历史记录、差异、提交、分支和 blame 信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The absolute path to the local Git repository you want the AI to read.
ast.target: 您希望 AI 读取的本地 Git 仓库的绝对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieve and analyse error issues, stack traces, and events from your Sentry projects.
ast.target: 从您的 Sentry 项目中检索和分析错误问题、堆栈跟踪和事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A Sentry internal integration token with read access to issues. Create one in Sentry → Settings → Developer Settings → Internal Integrations.
ast.target: 一个具有问题读取权限的 Sentry 内部集成令牌。在 Sentry → 设置 → 开发者设置 → 内部集成中创建一个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read and write files on your local machine within an allowed directory.
ast.target: 在允许的目录内读取和写入您本地机器上的文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The root directory the server is allowed to access. The AI can read and write any file inside this folder.
ast.target: 服务器允许访问的根目录。AI 可以读取和写入此文件夹内的任何文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Query and inspect a PostgreSQL database.
ast.target: 查询和检查 PostgreSQL 数据库。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Query a local SQLite database file. Requires uv (Python package manager).
ast.target: 查询本地 SQLite 数据库文件。需要 uv（Python 包管理器）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The absolute path to your .db file.
ast.target: 您的 .db 文件的绝对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Manage your Supabase project — database, auth, storage, and more.
ast.target: 管理您的 Supabase 项目——数据库、身份验证、存储等。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your Supabase personal access token. Find it in Supabase Dashboard → Account → Access Tokens.
ast.target: 您的 Supabase 个人访问令牌。在 Supabase 仪表板 → 账户 → 访问令牌中找到它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search and read files from Google Drive. Requires a one-time OAuth setup via Google Cloud Console before connecting.
ast.target: 从 Google Drive 搜索和读取文件。在连接前需要通过 Google Cloud Console 进行一次性 OAuth 设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Absolute path where the OAuth credentials will be saved after the auth flow (e.g. C:\Users\you\.gdrive-server-credentials.json). Must match the path used when you ran the auth command.
ast.target: OAuth 凭据在认证流程后保存的绝对路径（例如 C:\\Users\\you\\.gdrive-server-credentials.json）。必须与您运行认证命令时使用的路径匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read and write Notion pages and databases via the official Notion MCP server. Requires a Notion internal integration token.
ast.target: 通过官方 Notion MCP 服务器读取和写入 Notion 页面和数据库。需要一个 Notion 内部集成令牌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Geocode addresses, search places, get directions, and look up location details.
ast.target: 对地址进行地理编码、搜索地点、获取路线和查找位置详情。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A Google Maps Platform API key with the Maps, Places, and Directions APIs enabled. Create one in the Google Cloud Console.
ast.target: 一个启用了 Maps、Places 和 Directions API 的 Google Maps Platform API 密钥。在 Google Cloud Console 中创建一个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Interact with your Obsidian vault via the Local REST API plugin. Allows listing, reading, searching, and patching notes. Requires the "Local REST API" community plugin to be installed and active.
ast.target: 通过 Local REST API 插件与您的 Obsidian 库进行交互。允许列出、读取、搜索和修补笔记。需要安装并激活“Local REST API”社区插件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The API key generated by the Local REST API plugin.
ast.target: 由 Local REST API 插件生成的 API 密钥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The IP address Obsidian is running on.
ast.target: Obsidian 运行所在的 IP 地址。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The port the Local REST API is listening on.
ast.target: Local REST API 正在监听的端口。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read messages and post to Slack channels.
ast.target: 读取消息并发布到 Slack 频道。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your Slack bot OAuth token. Create a Slack app at api.slack.com/apps, add bot scopes, install it to your workspace, and copy the Bot User OAuth Token.
ast.target: 您的 Slack 机器人 OAuth 令牌。在 api.slack.com/apps 创建一个 Slack 应用，添加机器人权限范围，将其安装到您的工作区，并复制 Bot User OAuth Token。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your Slack workspace ID. Find it in your Slack workspace URL: https://app.slack.com/client/TXXXXXXXX — the part starting with T.
ast.target: 您的 Slack 工作区 ID。在您的 Slack 工作区 URL 中找到它：https://app.slack.com/client/TXXXXXXXX — 以 T 开头的部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieve information from AWS Bedrock Knowledge Bases.
ast.target: 从 AWS Bedrock 知识库检索信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your AWS access key ID. Create one in AWS Console → IAM → Users → Security credentials.
ast.target: 您的 AWS 访问密钥 ID。请在 AWS 控制台 → IAM → 用户 → 安全凭证中创建。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your AWS secret access key (shown only once when created).
ast.target: 您的 AWS 秘密访问密钥（创建时仅显示一次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The AWS region where your Knowledge Base is deployed (e.g., us-east-1).
ast.target: 您的知识库部署所在的 AWS 区域（例如，us-east-1）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Structured thinking tools: sequential reasoning, mental models (First Principles, Occam's Razor, Pareto), design patterns, debugging approaches, and programming paradigms.
ast.target: 结构化思维工具：顺序推理、心智模型（第一性原理、奥卡姆剃刀、帕累托法则）、设计模式、调试方法和编程范式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate hand-drawn diagrams via the official Excalidraw+ remote MCP. Requires an Excalidraw+ subscription and API key. For a free local option use "Excalidraw (Local Canvas)" above.
ast.target: 通过官方 Excalidraw+ 远程 MCP 生成手绘图表。需要 Excalidraw+ 订阅和 API 密钥。如需免费的本地选项，请使用上方的“Excalidraw（本地画布）”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your Excalidraw+ API key. Create one in your Excalidraw+ account settings.
ast.target: 您的 Excalidraw+ API 密钥。请在您的 Excalidraw+ 账户设置中创建。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate 26+ interactive chart types (bar, line, pie, sankey, treemap, mind map, flowchart, word cloud, and more) from data using the AntV visualization library.
ast.target: 使用 AntV 可视化库从数据生成 26 种以上交互式图表类型（柱状图、折线图、饼图、桑基图、矩形树图、思维导图、流程图、词云等）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render 31 interactive chart types and full dashboards (bar, line, pie, scatter, heatmap, geo map, KPI widgets, live polling, and more) directly inside your AI conversation.
ast.target: 在您的 AI 对话中直接渲染 31 种交互式图表类型和完整仪表板（柱状图、折线图、饼图、散点图、热力图、地理地图、KPI 小部件、实时轮询等）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search, download, and analyse academic papers from arXiv. Requires uv (Python package manager).
ast.target: 从 arXiv 搜索、下载和分析学术论文。需要 uv（Python 包管理器）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A local folder where downloaded arXiv papers will be saved. Will be created if it does not exist.
ast.target: 下载的 arXiv 论文将保存到的本地文件夹。如果不存在，将自动创建。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Official Linear remote MCP — search, create, and update issues, projects, and comments. No local install needed.
ast.target: 官方 Linear 远程 MCP — 搜索、创建和更新问题、项目和评论。无需本地安装。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Official Atlassian remote MCP — read and update Jira issues and Confluence pages.
ast.target: 官方 Atlassian 远程 MCP — 读取和更新 Jira 问题及 Confluence 页面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your Atlassian account API token. Create one at id.atlassian.com → Security → API tokens.
ast.target: 您的 Atlassian 账户 API 令牌。请在 id.atlassian.com → 安全 → API 令牌中创建。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 从来源生成多项选择题测验

ast.name: description
ast.source: Submit the list of tool names selected to answer the user query.
ast.target: 提交用于回答用户查询所选工具名称的列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The exact names of the tools selected.

ast.name: description
ast.target: 选择这些工具的简要原因。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 快速 BM25 关键词搜索

ast.name: description
ast.target: 使用 MCP 服务器和工具

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search your vault, find recent web information, and create a comprehensive document with all findings.
ast.target: 搜索您的知识库，查找最新的网络信息，并创建一份包含所有发现的综合文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gather information from your personal notes and the web, then synthesize a detailed comparison.
ast.target: 从您的个人笔记和网络中收集信息，然后综合出一份详细的比较。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a structured summary from your meeting notes with clear action items.
ast.target: 根据您的会议笔记创建一份结构化的摘要，并列出清晰的行动项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Combine vault knowledge and web research to create a comprehensive reference document in a specific folder.
ast.target: 结合知识库知识和网络研究，在特定文件夹中创建一份全面的参考文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use vault and web sources together for thorough research.
ast.target: 结合使用知识库和网络来源进行深入研究。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Python execution is not supported due to Obsidian security policies (dynamic script injection is blocked).
ast.target: 由于 Obsidian 安全策略（动态脚本注入被阻止），不支持 Python 执行。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 从当前 PDF 提取文本

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 输入要排除的文件夹名称...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 搜索或输入文件夹路径...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Provide custom instructions for the AI (optional)...
ast.target: 为 AI 提供自定义指令（可选）...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Set a name for this URL...
ast.target: 为此 URL 设置名称...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: e.g., "You are a helpful coding assistant. Always provide code examples in TypeScript. Be concise and direct."
ast.target: 例如，“你是一个有用的编程助手。始终提供 TypeScript 代码示例。简洁直接。”

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 例如，编程助手、论文撰写者...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Search sessions by name or message content...
ast.target: 按名称或消息内容搜索会话...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: e.g., "Make it more concise", "Fix grammar", "Translate to Spanish", etc.
ast.target: 例如，“让它更简洁”、“修正语法”、“翻译成西班牙语”等。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pick a server from the catalog and we'll auto-fill the configuration for you.
ast.target: 从目录中选择一个服务器，我们将为您自动填充配置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Don't see your server? Use "Add MCP Server" to configure it manually.
ast.target: 没看到您的服务器？使用“添加 MCP 服务器”手动配置。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 没有服务器匹配您的搜索。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 从您当前的保险库自动填充

ast.name: text
ast.source: Review the settings below before adding this server.
ast.target: 添加此服务器前，请检查以下设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ✓ Detected from your current vault. Edit if needed.
ast.target: ✓ 从您当前的保险库检测到。如需要可编辑。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No verified models with latency data available for this provider. Please run "Verify models" first.
ast.target: 此提供商没有可用的延迟数据的已验证模型。请先运行“验证模型”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Models are ranked from fastest to slowest based on the Time-To-First-Token (TTFT) recorded during the last verification.
ast.target: 模型根据上次验证期间记录的首令牌时间 (TTFT) 从最快到最慢进行排名。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No custom providers added. Click the + button to add one (e.g., Together AI, DeepSeek, vLLM).
ast.target: 尚未添加自定义提供商。请点击 + 按钮添加一个（例如 Together AI、DeepSeek、vLLM）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Adjust how much weight is given to matches in different parts of your notes. Higher values = more important.
ast.target: 调整笔记不同部分匹配项的权重。数值越高 = 越重要。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select one embedding index and one BM25 index for hybrid search. For flash search (@flash), BM25 index must be checked.
ast.target: 为混合搜索选择一个嵌入索引和一个 BM25 索引。对于快速搜索 (@flash)，必须勾选 BM25 索引。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to extend AI capabilities with external tools and resources. Use @mcp in chat to access MCP tools.
ast.target: 配置模型上下文协议 (MCP) 服务器，以通过外部工具和资源扩展 AI 功能。在聊天中使用 @mcp 访问 MCP 工具。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Control how code blocks in AI responses are executed. Supported languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, Python.
ast.target: 控制 AI 响应中代码块的执行方式。支持的语言：JavaScript、TypeScript、HTML、CSS、Python。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure delay limiting for MCP queries to prevent API rate limit errors.
ast.target: 配置 MCP 查询的延迟限制，以防止 API 速率限制错误。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Extracts video transcript and sends to your selected AI model. Works with Gemini, Groq, and OpenRouter. Faster and more cost-effective. Automatically detects available languages.
ast.target: 提取视频转录文本并发送到您选择的 AI 模型。适用于 Gemini、Groq 和 OpenRouter。更快且更具成本效益。自动检测可用语言。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Uses Gemini's multimodal API to analyze video directly (audio + visual). Requires Gemini API key. Best for videos without transcripts or when visual analysis is needed.
ast.target: 使用 Gemini 的多模态 API 直接分析视频（音频 + 视觉）。需要 Gemini API 密钥。最适合没有转录文本或需要视觉分析的视频。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you encounter any bugs or have suggestions for improvements, please create an issue.
ast.target: 如果您遇到任何错误或有改进建议，请创建一个问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Any ideas or support are highly appreciated!
ast.target: 任何想法或支持都深表感谢！

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure custom models for each provider. Enable/disable models to control which appear in the model selector.
ast.target: 为每个提供商配置自定义模型。启用/禁用模型以控制哪些模型出现在模型选择器中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No models added for this provider.
ast.target: 此提供商尚未添加任何模型。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Controls randomness. Lower values make output more focused and deterministic. (0.0-2.0)
ast.target: 控制随机性。较低的值使输出更集中和确定。(0.0-2.0)

ast.name: text
ast.source: Controls diversity via nucleus sampling. Lower values make output more focused. (0.0-1.0)
ast.target: 通过核采样控制多样性。较低的值使输出更集中。(0.0-1.0)

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure custom embedding models for each provider.
ast.target: 为每个提供商配置自定义嵌入模型。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No embedding models added for this provider.
ast.target: 此提供商尚未添加任何嵌入模型。

ast.name: text
ast.source: MCP Prerequisites — check that the required runtimes are installed on this machine:
ast.target: MCP 前提条件 — 请检查此机器上是否已安装所需的运行时：

ast.name: text
ast.source: No MCP servers configured. Click "Add MCP Server" to get started.
ast.target: 未配置 MCP 服务器。请点击“添加 MCP 服务器”开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Paste a raw MCP server configuration JSON. It can be a full "mcpServers" dictionary or a single server object.
ast.target: 粘贴原始 MCP 服务器配置 JSON。它可以是完整的“mcpServers”字典或单个服务器对象。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select folders to automatically include all their files as sources. New files added to these folders will be available when you reopen the notebook.
ast.target: 选择文件夹以自动将其所有文件包含为源。添加到这些文件夹的新文件将在您重新打开笔记本时可用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select RSS/Atom feeds from your saved feeds. Recent entries (based on duration) will be added as web sources.
ast.target: 从您保存的订阅源中选择 RSS/Atom 订阅源。最近的条目（基于持续时间）将作为网页源添加。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You have already called some tools and received results. Please now synthesise a complete, direct answer to the original question using all the tool results above. Do not call any more tools — just write the final answer.
ast.target: 您已经调用了一些工具并收到了结果。请现在使用上述所有工具结果，综合出一个完整、直接的答案来回答原始问题。不要再调用任何工具 — 只需写出最终答案。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Failed to generate explanation. Please try again.

ast.name: text
ast.source: No cards match the selected filter.
ast.target: 没有卡片匹配所选筛选条件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No sessions yet. Start a new one!
ast.target: 尚无会话。开始一个新会话吧！

ast.name: text
ast.source: Quiz data not found. Please regenerate.
ast.target: 未找到测验数据。请重新生成。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Flashcard data not found. Please regenerate.
ast.target: 未找到闪卡数据。请重新生成。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 尚无已保存的视觉素材。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The transcript will be saved as a markdown file and automatically added to your context.
ast.target: 字幕将保存为Markdown文件，并自动添加到您的上下文中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These file types don't support preview. Please accept the file creation to continue.
ast.target: 这些文件类型不支持预览。请接受文件创建以继续。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This file will not be created.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select one or more MCP servers to use for this query. You can also pick specific resources or tools from each server.
ast.target: 选择一个或多个MCP服务器用于此查询。您还可以从每个服务器中选择特定的资源或工具。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No MCP servers configured or enabled. Please configure servers in settings.
ast.target: 未配置或启用MCP服务器。请在设置中配置服务器。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter the YouTube video URL to add as context
ast.target: 输入要添加为上下文的YouTube视频URL

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter one or more web page URLs to add as context
ast.target: 输入一个或多个要添加为上下文的网页URL

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set custom instructions for the messages in this session.
ast.target: 为此会话中的消息设置自定义指令。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter a name for this system instruction:
ast.target: 为此系统指令输入名称：

ast.name: text
ast.source: No saved instructions yet. Use the + button to save your current instructions.
ast.target: 尚无已保存的指令。使用 + 按钮保存您当前的指令。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The selected vault is not fully indexed. Please index to retrieve the most up to date info from your inclusions.
ast.target: 所选库未完全索引。请索引以从您的包含项中检索最新信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can combine multiple triggers in a single query to orchestrate complex workflows. The AI will execute them intelligently in sequence.
ast.target: 您可以在单个查询中组合多个触发器来编排复杂的工作流程。AI将智能地按顺序执行它们。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Triggers execute in intelligent order: data gathering → processing → actions
ast.target: 触发器按智能顺序执行：数据收集 → 处理 → 操作

ast.name: text
ast.source: Results from each trigger are shared with subsequent triggers
ast.target: 每个触发器的结果会与后续触发器共享

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can use the same trigger multiple times if needed
ast.target: 如果需要，您可以多次使用同一个触发器

ast.name: text
ast.source: Watch the live timeline to see progress for each step
ast.target: 查看实时时间线以了解每个步骤的进度

ast.name: text
ast.source: Searched in session names and all message content
ast.target: 在会话名称和所有消息内容中搜索

ast.name: text
ast.source: View all entries from selected feeds
ast.target: 查看所选订阅源的所有条目

ast.name: text
ast.source: No feeds or folders saved yet.
ast.target: 尚未保存任何订阅源或文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Load a feed from the "Nexus Feed" view to see entries here.
ast.target: 从“Nexus 订阅源”视图加载一个订阅源以在此处查看条目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No entries found in this feed.
ast.target: 此订阅源中未找到条目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No entries found from saved feeds.
ast.target: 未从已保存的订阅源中找到条目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No bookmarked entries yet. Bookmark items from your feeds to see them here.
ast.target: 尚无书签条目。从您的订阅源中为项目添加书签即可在此处查看。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No index configurations found. Create an index in Settings → Index Management.
ast.target: 未找到索引配置。请在“设置 → 索引管理”中创建索引。

ast.name: text
ast.target: ✓ 所有包含的文件均已索引

ast.name: text
ast.source: What would you like to do with this text?
ast.target: 您希望对此文本执行什么操作？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Compare the original and edited versions. Accept to apply changes or Reject to keep original. Press ESC to cancel.
ast.target: 比较原始版本和编辑后的版本。接受以应用更改，或拒绝以保留原文。按 ESC 取消。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter the YouTube video URL to fetch its transcript.
ast.target: 输入 YouTube 视频 URL 以获取其字幕。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 连接到此 MCP 服务器

ast.name: title
ast.source: Let the AI decide which tools to use
ast.target: 让 AI 决定使用哪些工具

ast.name: title
ast.target: 📚 研究 → 综合 → 文档化
